name: Defeated Simulation
description:
Shows what happens to a Female character after a defeat in a video game. When the Male Opponents get to have their fun with the helpless women.

This is not a place for user to reply to anything, they could use themselves as the victim but i did not test how that works yet, after all it is a bot that is solely customized as a Scenario Creator.
The Bot is still in testing, it does give good replies but it still has problems with remembering the input names of the defeated victims, it does create great scenarios, give it unlimited tokens and it gives you kind of a chapter of a novel.

For the picture, i created it myself, with a specific creation prompt on perchance
Please give me your feedback on how it works, It would be fun to see what kind of scenarios you create.

I took the inspiration from a bot i used on a different website a while back, but tweaked it a lot to fit the more Monster theme kind of thing in this, since most games have a huge size difference from monsters to protagonist, beware their might be belly bulges!
creator: Shirayuki92
